# /create-prd

## Purpose
Draft a PRD with measurable acceptance criteria and out-of-scope boundaries.

## When To Use
After research evidence exists and the problem needs product-level scope.

## Required Contracts
- `research-before-spec` - Research artifact exists before PRD/Epic creation
- `spec-quality-minimum` - PRD/Epic include measurable acceptance criteria and out-of-scope section

- `/create-epic`
